# dependencytrack_oidc_group (Resource)

Manages an OpenID Connect (OIDC) group in Dependency-Track. OIDC groups are plain database entities and can be managed without an identity provider configured.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "dependencytrack_oidc_group" "example" {
  name = "platform-engineers"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the OIDC group

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The UUID of the OIDC group

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# OIDC groups can be imported using their UUID
terraform import dependencytrack_oidc_group.example 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000
```
